completed_this_session.title: Real background task visibility in task_board
completed_this_session.description: Added Bus.Service dependency to TaskTool, published CoordEvents.TaskStatusChanged at all 4 lifecycle points (running, completed, failed x2). Schema file created. Zero typecheck errors added.

integration_blockers.description: packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts imports ./github-ipc and ./ipc-validation — both files don't exist on disk. Typecheck fails with TS2307. IPC test 'cannot find module ../src/main/ipc-validation'. 3 typecheck errors total (2 TS2307 + 1 TS7006 implicit any).
integration_blockers.recommended_action: Create packages/desktop/src/main/github-ipc.ts and packages/desktop/src/main/ipc-validation.ts matching the imports in ipc.ts, OR revert the imports from ipc.ts and inline the needed functions.

integration_blockers.description: Pre-existing TS2304 error in dialog-manage-agents.tsx (writeQueue not in scope) — may be resolved once INT-001 is fixed and full typecheck runs.
Pre-existing TS2339 in packages/desktop/src/renderer/cli.ts (installCli orphan) — stale reference to removed module.
integration_blockers.recommended_action: Remove or stub the cli.ts reference.

pre_existing_test_failures.description: extractResponseText returns null instead of text value in packages/opencode/src/github/service.ts. formatPromptTooLargeError formatting defects in packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts. These are production bugs unrelated to Phase 2 frozen lanes.
